description: A system audit reveals a customer has two accounts under slightly different email addresses. An agent needs to merge them.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two duplicate customer accounts and their associated order histories.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the details for both accounts.

nodes.task_description: Select the primary account and merge the order history from the secondary account into it.
Disable the secondary account and notify the customer of the merge.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent deactivates the duplicate and informs the customer.
